scores.correctness_notes: Correctly covers all three roles, required interface field, optional/limit/scope fields with accurate descriptions. Matches gold standard well.
scores.hallucination_notes: Minor inaccuracy: states 'CLAUDE.md instructions here require it' for optional field (fabricated justification), and scope description slightly mischaracterizes container scope as 'Kubernetes co-located sidecar relations' when gold standard notes it's only relevant for machine charms, not Kubernetes. Also omits the constraint that interface names can only use a-z and hyphens and cannot start with 'juju-'.
